note: The DNJ Kanban board — the main UI surface for DDLNY and (later) DNJ vendor users.

board.name: DNJ board
board.filter_jql: project = DNJ AND issuetype = Style ORDER BY Rank ASC

columns_note: 14 visible columns + 1 backlog column. One column per Style status, ordered to match the DNJ Style Workflow phase order. Column config is stored at /rest/greenhopper/1.0/rapidviewconfig/columns (not via public REST).
